history.content:
<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column G. I need to move away from nearby lava: the cell in front (row 02 column C) is lava (`L`), so I must not move forward. To progress, I’ll turn right so I can face down and then head toward the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is floor (`.`), so it’s safe to move forward toward the lower area and eventually reach the goal at row 08 column G.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 04 column B) is `.` (safe), and moving forward keeps me on the main corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<action>

<thought>
I’m at row 08 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 09 column B) is `#` (wall), so I must change direction. To get closer to the goal at row 08 column H, I should turn right to face west/east? Facing down, TURN_LEFT would face right (`>`), which is toward increasing columns and the goal. I’ll turn left once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 08 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H; moving right is blocked until there’s a clear path. The cell immediately in front (row 08 column C) is `L` (lava), so I should not move forward. I’ll turn left to face up (`^`) to find a safer route around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 08 column B facing up (`^`). Forward would take me to row 07 column B, which is `.` (safe). This also helps move around the lava to reach the goal at row 08 column H. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m now at row 07 column B facing up (`^`). Forward would move to row 06 column B, which is `.` (safe). The goal is farther right, so advancing upward first should keep me on a safe path around the lava. I’ll move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 06 column B facing up (`^`). Forward to row 05 column B is `.` (safe). Moving up keeps me on the left open corridor and should allow me to work my way toward the goal at row 08 column H while avoiding lava. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 05 column B facing up (`^`). The cell in front (row 04 column B) is `.` and safe. Advancing upward should keep me on the left corridor and allow a route to the goal at row 08 column H while avoiding lava. I’ll move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is `.` (safe). Moving forward brings me closer while staying away from lava. I’ll move forward.

<thought>

</thought>
<action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). The cell in front (row 01 column B) is `#`, a wall, so I can’t move forward. To keep moving toward the goal, I need to turn right to face east (`>`), then I can move into row 02 column C where there is lava `L`—so I shouldn’t. Instead, turn left to face west (`<`) toward row 02 column A which is `#` as well. The only viable direction is to face down (`v`) by turning around; I can do this with two left turns. First, turn left to face left (`<`) as a step toward facing down later.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing left (`<`). The cell to the left (row 02 column A) is `#`, so I can’t move forward. To progress toward the open corridor, I should face down (`v`) by turning right once (from left to up). Then I can turn right again (up to right) or left; however, the only non-wall adjacent direction here is down (row 03 column B is `.`). From left, turning right gives `^` and then turning right again gives `>`; that’s not down. So I will turn left to face down directly: left (`<`) turn left -> down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is `.` (safe), while row 02 column C is lava `L` and row 02 column A is a wall. So I should move forward into row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
